criteria.name: Dashboard Presence
criteria.description: Presence of a dashboard or summary section with multiple visual elements

criteria.name: Sales by Product
criteria.description: Sales analysis by product is present (table/chart/summary)

criteria.name: Sales by City
criteria.description: Sales analysis by city is present

criteria.name: Sales by Category
criteria.description: Sales analysis by category is present

criteria.name: Sales by Sales Rep
criteria.description: Sales analysis by sales representative is present

criteria.name: Charts / Visualization
criteria.description: Presence of charts or visual indicators (even if not perfectly formatted)

criteria.name: Interactivity (Slicers)
criteria.description: Evidence of filters, slicers, or segmented views

criteria.name: Insights
criteria.description: Meaningful observations or interpretations from data

criteria.name: Structure & Organization
criteria.description: Clear layout, readable structure, and logical grouping

instructions: Be liberal in grading. Reward visible effort, dashboard structure, and insights. Do NOT penalize if pivot tables or slicers are not directly visible in extracted text. If charts or summaries are implied, consider them present. Avoid giving very low marks unless submission is empty or clearly incomplete.
